description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the elixir:latest Docker image. Define two stages: test and styles, and configure a cache keyed by the job stage that stores the deps/ and _build/ directories. Include a global before_script that runs mix local.hex --force, mix local.rebar --force, and mix deps.get for every job. Add a styles-stage job named credo that executes mix credo --ignore refactor list. Add a test-stage job named test that sets the MIX_ENV variable to test and runs mix test.
